data.name: ksNoEntrySelected
data.comment: Placeholder shown in the Avalonia lexical-edit surface when no record is selected.

data.name: ksEntryTypeUnsupported
data.value: The new lexical edit view is currently available only for lexical entry records. Other record types use the classic view.
data.comment: Shown when the Avalonia lexical-edit surface is asked to display a non-LexEntry record.

data.name: ksUnsupportedEditor
data.value: (this field type is not supported in the new view yet)
data.comment: Shown in place of a field whose editor has no Avalonia renderer.

data.name: ksSave
data.comment: Commit button of the Avalonia lexical-edit region editor.

data.name: ksCancel
data.comment: Cancel button of the Avalonia lexical-edit region editor.

data.name: ksUndoEditEntry
data.comment: Undo label for the fenced lexical-edit session; appears in the Edit menu.

data.name: ksRedoEditEntry
data.comment: Redo label for the fenced lexical-edit session; appears in the Edit menu.

data.name: ksLexemeFormRequired
data.value: A Lexeme Form (or Citation Form) is required.
data.comment: Validation message when an entry would be saved without any lexeme/citation form text.

data.name: ksLexicalEditRegionName
data.comment: Screen-reader name of the Avalonia lexical-edit region surface.

data.name: ksAvaloniaHostName
data.comment: Screen-reader name of the WinForms control hosting the Avalonia surface.

data.name: ksGhostAddPrompt
data.comment: Ghost add-prompt line shown for an empty field section; {0} is the field label.

data.name: ksCopy
data.comment: Context-menu command copying a field's text.
